summary: Clear soundboard capture of a solid set list that fans enjoyed
review: Both reviewers give the show high marks, noting a good setlist and thanking Charlie Miller for making the recordings available. No specific audio problems are mentioned, suggesting the soundboard source sounds satisfactory. Overall the performance is regarded as a worthwhile addition to the archive.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are positive (4 and 5 stars) and highlight a good set list with no complaints about sound; limited detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit audio issues cited; reviewers imply the soundboard recording is satisfactory.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the set list as good and enjoyable.
